summary: Backend-only regression for the BrowserRouter basename={process.env.PUBLIC_URL || '/'} fix at /app/frontend/src/App.tsx line 129. Verified (1) literal string present on line 129, (2) TSX parses (no syntax errors via tsc; remaining diagnostics are type-only: missing @types/node + react module resolution under standalone tsc, none are parse errors), (3) GET /api/event/health -> 200, (4) POST /api/auth/login with vitokdrako@gmail.com/test123 -> access_token returned (admin role), (5) canonical 5-suite regression bundle 80/80 PASS in 88.55s.
action_items: User must rebuild and redeploy the admin to pick up the basename change: cd /var/www/farforrent/frontend && PUBLIC_URL=/admin yarn build && sudo cp -a build/. /var/www/rentalhub-admin-build-subpath/ && sudo systemctl reload nginx
critical_code_review_comments: Line 129 fix is correct and minimal: <Router basename={process.env.PUBLIC_URL || '/'}> — CRA bakes PUBLIC_URL at build time, so admin build (PUBLIC_URL=/admin) gets basename='/admin' and pod build (default '') gets basename='/'. No behavioural change for the pod.

Note: lines 121 and 125 use window.location.href = '/dashboard' and '/tasks' — these are absolute (not relative to basename) and will break under the /admin subpath after the rebuild. Consider replacing with navigate() (which respects basename) or prefix manually with process.env.PUBLIC_URL. Not blocking this iteration but will manifest on admin host.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 covered a one-line BrowserRouter basename fix. Backend untouched, 5-suite regression remains green. Frontend cannot be exercised in-pod (admin lives on external host). If admin still shows blank after redeploy, suspect the two window.location.href calls (App.tsx lines 121,125) which bypass the router basename and will route outside /admin/.
rca of the issue: Original blank page on https://farforevent.com.ua/admin/ was due to React Router routes registered at root paths (e.g. /manager) while the app was served from /admin/. Router had no basename so /admin/manager could not match. Fix sets basename=process.env.PUBLIC_URL (baked to /admin at build time).
